decisions: D100: V0 uses a local non-adversarial concurrency model.
Keep sibling staging, complete JSON/HTML validation, run_id identity, existing-target refusal, no silent overwrite, and staging diagnostics.
POSIX 0700/0600 is best-effort privacy behavior, not a cross-platform Wave 2 exit gate.
Defer native race-proof no-replace primitives, recursive symlink hardening, platform-specific locking, and their adversarial fault-injection tests.
evidence.implementation_boundary: D100 refines D99 without weakening the artifact-pair invariant
evidence.scope: documentation and plan refinement only; no implementation migration
